caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a dark garment over a grey shirt. A professional condenser microphone on a shock mount is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man shifts his gaze; he begins with his eyes closed, then looks toward his left, returns to a forward-facing position, and finally looks further to his left. A black boom arm is visible to the left of the frame, with a small gold-colored connector. There is no on-screen text or logos present. The background and equipment remain static as the man's facial expression and head orientation change slightly across the frames.
